title: Means 3D items
description: Turns a lot of the simple extruded 2d textures into 3d models!
body:
It's here! A big update overhauling the entire pack. This update features Pixel Consistent* items, eating animation, new tools, animated buckets, tropical fish and axolotl variants, signs, boats, and a whole lot more!

This pack works flawlessly for 1.21.11 (and presumably up) but has some hiccups and bugs I want to iron out on older versions, but might work on older versions coupled with mods. This is not officially supported.

EMF+ETF is optional, if you want the arrow entity to have a custom model too.



<details>
<summary>*</summary>

*some items are not updated, and therefore not pixel consistent

</details>




The pack is inspired by [Actions and Stuff](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4.1/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) .
